name: Mobileye Global Inc.
description: Mobileye Global Inc. is a leader in the development and deployment of advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) and autonomous driving technologies. Founded in 1999, the company pioneered vision-based safety systems, utilizing its proprietary EyeQ™ system-on-chip and computer vision algorithms to enhance vehicle safety and enable autonomous mobility. Headquartered in Jerusalem, Israel, and incorporated in the United States, Mobileye provides a comprehensive suite of solutions, ranging from basic driver-assist features to fully autonomous driving capabilities, working with global automotive manufacturers to drive the evolution toward smarter, safer, and more efficient transportation for the mass market.
